name: Golem's Grudge
description: Iron Golems sense the unnatural in you and turn hostile on sight.

actions.command: execute as @e[type=minecraft:iron_golem,distance=..32] at @s run data modify entity @s AngryAt set from entity @p[distance=..32] UUID
execute as @e[type=minecraft:iron_golem,distance=..32] run data modify entity @s AngerTime set value 100
